batches.title: Live orchestration verification
batches.objective: Verify that the Claude→Codex orchestration workflow operates correctly end-to-end by making a documentation-only change. Do not modify runtime code, curriculum content, tests, or application behavior.
acceptance_criteria: A concise 'Live orchestration verified' note is added to the orchestration documentation.
No runtime application files are modified.
No curriculum or question content is modified.
Claude reports no critical or high-severity findings.
The checkpoint is pushed to the existing feature branch.
